## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on pipeline and events strategy, addressing ongoing projects and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/ghvnGjHzHHiYnbYYpm9dskkFbzF7xxuH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need for a comprehensive, high-level events strategy document to guide execution](https://fathom.video/share/ghvnGjHzHHiYnbYYpm9dskkFbzF7xxuH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Ongoing discussions with key accounts (Liver, RAPID, Superhuman, Weavegrid) require follow-up actions](https://fathom.video/share/ghvnGjHzHHiYnbYYpm9dskkFbzF7xxuH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [New potential work streams (e.g., video content for Metronome) need clear scoping and pricing](https://fathom.video/share/ghvnGjHzHHiYnbYYpm9dskkFbzF7xxuH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Upcoming events (workshops, dinners) require better coordination and planning](https://fathom.video/share/ghvnGjHzHHiYnbYYpm9dskkFbzF7xxuH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Account Updates
